## Checklist

- [ ] Django app/module boundaries are respected (`apps/`, `common/`, `config/`, `infrastructure/`)
- [ ] Settings use `config.settings.*`
- [ ] Migrations are included or not needed
- [ ] API behavior, serializers, permissions, or validation changes are documented
- [ ] Tests are added/updated or the reason is noted
